Any content (original or external) that can help make the practice of ML/AI more connected, accessible, efficient, and reproducible is welcome on the Nexus platform! This includes, but is not limited to...

| | Section | What's inside |
|---|---|---|
| 🧠 | [**Learn**](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Learn/) | Learn ML/AI with workshops, books, videos, guides, and notebooks |
| 🛠 | [**Toolbox**](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/) | Models, datasets, libraries, and compute resources |
| 🖊️ | [**Stories**](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Applications/) | Blogs, talks, and real-world applications of ML/AI |
| 🚀 | [**Projects**](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Projects/) | Put your ML/AI skills to the test by engaging in a community project |

**Disclaimer**: *The crowdsourced resources on this website are not endorsed by the UW-Madison and have not been vetted by the Division of Information Technology.*
